conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Getting bids for the kitchen renovation -- Meridian Builders, Coastal Renovations, and Hartley and Sons all sent quotes.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Meridian's quote was the lowest but their earliest availability is almost four months out.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Coastal Renovations has good reviews online but a couple mentioned delays on past projects.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I need to get new tires before winter.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Hartley and Sons could start in about six weeks, and when I called a couple of their references, everything checked out fine.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Got the tires done, the shop also found a nail in one of the old ones.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Called two of Hartley and Sons' past clients and both said the timeline estimate held up in practice.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Meridian's price is tempting but four months is a long time to wait on this.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: My neighbor's fence project finally got finished after weeks of delays.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Coastal's reviews about delays made me a little more cautious about their timeline promises.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Going with Hartley and Sons for the kitchen renovation. Their timeline was two months shorter than Meridian's and their references actually checked out.

query: Which contractor did the user choose for the kitchen renovation?
